com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display

Class DiaplayQRImageParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.display.DiaplayQRImageParameters

  • public class DiaplayQRImageParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    QR image parameters.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DiaplayQRImageParameters() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      QRErrorCorrectLevel getLevel()
      Gets error correct level.
      QRMask getMask()
      Gets mask number.
      QRTextPosition getPosition()
      Gets the relative position of the text and QR image.
      byte[] getTextData()
      Gets the text displayed when showing QR code.
      byte getVersion()
      Gets version of QR size.
      byte getXCoordinate()
      Gets the X coordinate where the QR Code displayed.
      byte getYCoordinate()
      Gets the Y coordinate where the QR Code to be displayed.
      boolean isAutoCenter()
      Auto-center display QR code or not.
      void setAutoCenter(boolean autoCenter)
      Sets whether auto-center display QR code or not.
      void setLevel(QRErrorCorrectLevel level)
      Sets error correct level.
      void setMask(QRMask mask)
      Sets mask number.
      void setPosition(QRTextPosition position)
      Sets the relative position of the text and QR image.
      void setTextData(byte[] textData)
      Sets the text displayed when showing QR code
      void setVersion(byte version)
      Sets version of QR size.
      void setXCoordinate(byte xCoordinate)
      Sets the X coordinate where the QR Code displayed.
      void setYCoordinate(byte yCoordinate)
      Sets the Y codrdinate where the QR Code to be displayed

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • DiaplayQRImageParameters

        public DiaplayQRImageParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • getLevel

        public QRErrorCorrectLevel getLevel()
        Gets error correct level.
        Returns:
        Error correct level. See QRErrorCorrectLevel, default value is QRErrorCorrectLevel.LEVEL_1.

      • setLevel

        public void setLevel(QRErrorCorrectLevel level)
        Sets error correct level.
        Parameters:
        level - Error correct level. See QRErrorCorrectLevel

      • getMask

        public QRMask getMask()
        Gets mask number.
        Returns:
        Mask number. See QRMask, default value is QRMask.MASK_1.

      • setMask

        public void setMask(QRMask mask)
        Sets mask number.
        Parameters:
        mask - Mask number. See QRMask.

      • getVersion

        public byte getVersion()
        Gets version of QR size.
        Returns:
        Version of QR size
        • Default value: 0
        • Value range: [0-20]
          • 0 - 164*164
          • 1 - 180 * 180
          • Size adds 16 pixel per version.

      • setVersion

        public void setVersion(byte version)
        Sets version of QR size.
        Parameters:
        version - Version of QR size
        • Default value: 0
        • Value range: [0-20]
          • 0 - 164*164
          • 1 - 180 * 180
          • Size adds 16 pixel per version.

      • isAutoCenter

        public boolean isAutoCenter()
        Auto-center display QR code or not.
        Returns:
        Auto-center flag
        • 'true': Auto-center display.
        • 'false': Not auto-center display.

      • setAutoCenter

        public void setAutoCenter(boolean autoCenter)
        Sets whether auto-center display QR code or not.
        Parameters:
        autoCenter - Auto-center flag.
        • 'true': Auto-center display.
        • 'false': Not auto-center display.

      • getXCoordinate

        public byte getXCoordinate()
        Gets the X coordinate where the QR Code displayed.
        Returns:
        X coordinate. Value range: [0-320).

      • setXCoordinate

        public void setXCoordinate(byte xCoordinate)
        Sets the X coordinate where the QR Code displayed.
        Parameters:
        xCoordinate - X coordinate. Value range: [0-320). This will work when auto center is disabled.

      • getYCoordinate

        public byte getYCoordinate()
        Gets the Y coordinate where the QR Code to be displayed.
        Returns:
        Y coordinate. Value range: [0-240).

      • setYCoordinate

        public void setYCoordinate(byte yCoordinate)
        Sets the Y codrdinate where the QR Code to be displayed
        Parameters:
        yCoordinate - Y coordinate. Value range: [0-240). This will work when auto center is disabled.

      • getPosition

        public QRTextPosition getPosition()
        Gets the relative position of the text and QR image.
        Returns:
        Position, see QRTextPosition. Default value is QRTextPosition.TOP.

      • setPosition

        public void setPosition(QRTextPosition position)
        Sets the relative position of the text and QR image.
        Parameters:
        position - See QRTextPosition. Default value is QRTextPosition.TOP.

      • getTextData

        public byte[] getTextData()
        Gets the text displayed when showing QR code.
        Returns:
        Text displayed when showing QR code, maximum 512 bytes.

      • setTextData

        public void setTextData(byte[] textData)
        Sets the text displayed when showing QR code
        Parameters:
        textData - Text displayed when showing QR code, maximum 512 bytes.
